productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Nike Black graphic Blue  Backpacks
description: nike presents the prefect T90 shoe bag. Attractive and useful with ample ventilation, you can carry this bag to the gym, for your soccer, tennis, cricket or any other game practice to store your shoes and socks. This handy little bag is guaranteed to get you loads of attention! Measurement Length: 34 cm Width: 15 cm Height: 14 cm Capacity: 9 litres Made of polyester for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Water-resistant tarapaulin bottom One main zippered compartment for shoes Mesh lining at the top and small slit at the bottom for increased ventilation One small zippered pocket and one small pouch for stowing socks and other essentials Graphic print on the front with T90 in large lettering nike Swoosh printed at the back Haul loop for ease of carrying Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
